items.title: RJ REACTS to Austin Reaves Becoming The Richest Undrafted Player EVER
items.body_excerpt: Austin Reaves becomes the richest undrafted player in NBA history with a $185M Lakers deal. RJ digs into the trend the Lakers need to fix, and the crew gets into the A-list center Luka wants and whether Jalen Duren is realistic. 🏀 Download the Fanatics Sportsbook app!…

items.title: Kenyon Believes in Trae Young
items.body_excerpt: Kenyon Believes in Trae Young as The Arena reacts to the Wizards giving a massive extension to Trae Young as well as selecting AJ Dybantsa with the number one pick in the NBA Draft. The Arena premieres every Monday, Tuesday and Thursday at 11:30am PT / 2:30pm ET. Sign up for…

items.title: Lakers Free-Agent Bargains + Cameron Carr's Introductory Press Conference
items.body_excerpt: Jovan Buha reacts to Cameron Carr's introductory press conference and then shares his perspective on free agents the Lakers can target on the cheap. If you enjoyed this video, please consider subscribing, commenting, and liking it. Buha's Block merch is LIVE!!!:…
